calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha , CSR: Maureen Howard #7156 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner/father, Shan Khin, is present in propria persona and on behalf of the minor childre, Nyein Si Thar and Htet Aung Lynn.

Petitioner/mother, Khin Gyi, is not present.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. Shan Khin is sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name as to the father and two minor children. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
